name: Mohak Chugh
headline: Software Development Engineer 2 (SDE 2) at Amazon — Backend, Data Systems & LLMs
summary: Full Stack Web Developer and Data Engineer who loves system design, building projects end to end, and the DevOps and entrepreneurial side of shipping software. Currently SDE 2 at Amazon working across backend, data systems and LLMs.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer 2
highlights: DFS-based reconciliation for 5MM+ employees with zero data loss in a 10-min SLA
RDS optimizations: query times 20 min -> under 30s across 200+ ETL pipelines
Designed a Candidate Search service; re-architected Search Populations API (5s -> <200ms P99)
Operational Excellence Champion: drove SEV2s from 21 to 3 per month

experience.title: Software Development Engineer 1
highlights: Spark big-data reconciliation engine processing 1B+ records/day
Award-winning RAG LLM Q&A bot (300+ users, 93% accuracy), published on the AWS Blog

experience.title: Data Engineer
highlights: AI-driven headcount management tools (95% forecast accuracy)
Analytical mesh data lake re-architecture across Redshift clusters
